reasons.text: The photo shows a highly detailed, multi-room Peppa Pig wooden playhouse with multiple figures and vehicles.
The listing description is extremely sparse, offering no details on the overall condition, age, or specific completeness of the set.
No structural damage or major paint flaking is immediately visible on the wooden house frame or plastic accessories in the photo.

seller_questions: Is the wooden house sturdy with all its screws and joints intact?
Are there any major scratches, chips, or drawing marks on the back or sides of the house?
Does this set come from a smoke-free and pet-free home?
Are all the figures and vehicles shown in the photo included in the final price?
seller_message_draft: Hi! I'm interested in your Peppa Pig wooden house. Is the structure still sturdy with all joints intact, and are all the figures/vehicles in the photo included? Thanks!
limitations: Cannot verify the structural integrity of the wooden joints or back panels from a single front-facing photo.
The exact number of originally included pieces versus missing parts is unstated in the brief description.
The physical cleanliness and any potential pet/smoke exposure are unverified due to sparse text.
research_recommended: Compare the included figures and furniture against the retail 'Peppa Pig Wooden Family Home' set to see what might be missing.
Check the typical resale price for this wooden house model to ensure the seller's asking price is fair.
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
